items.name: White Ski Goggles With Neck Scarf
items.description:
Clean, crisp, and winter-ready. These white ski goggles paired with a matching neck scarf give your avatar a fresh snow-fit with a sleek, modern edge. Perfect for icy outfits, cozy aesthetics, and standout winter looks. Cosmetic only, made purely for style.

Purchase more of this here:
https://www.roblox.com/communities/14186463/Social-UGC#!/about
